10 credits – Complete 2 courses from this list:
BBUS 449 – Accounting Practices in Not-for-Profit Organizations (363)
Why Choose Business at UW Bothell

Students are required to select either an Option or a Concentration to fulfill their Bachelor of Arts in Business Administration degree. We offer several options for students to customize their degree with one of four Options or eight Concentrations or a Self-Directed pathway.
Applicants are evaluated on GPA, prerequisite performance, and a personal statement.
Completion of prerequisite coursework is required before starting.
